content.text:
I'll help you get familiar with the codebase. Let me explore the workspace to understand what we're working with.

First, let me check what files and directories exist in the workspace:</think>I'll explore the workspace to understand the codebase structure and contents.

<thinking>
Let me start by exploring the workspace structure to understand what we're working with.
</thinking>

```bash
ls -la /workspace
```

Let me explore what's in this workspace:

```bash
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f -name "*.py" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.rb" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "Makefile" -o -name "README*" 2>/dev/null | head -100
```

Let me check the directory structure:

```bash
ls -la /workspace/
```
